//! This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
//! Structure: KeyLength
 #![allow(non_camel_case_types)]
 #![allow(unused_parens)]
 #![allow(missing_docs)]
 #![allow(unused_imports)]
 #![allow(unused_variables)]
 #![allow(unused_unsafe)]
 use std::ptr;

pub struct fastdata;

impl fastdata {
    const KEYS: [&'static str; 8] = [
        "aaa", "", "aaaaa", "aaaaaa", "aaaaaaa", "aaaaaaaa", "aaaaaaaaa", "aaaaaaaaaa"
    ];

    #[must_use]
    pub fn contains(key: &'static str) -> bool {
        let len = key.len();
        if len < 3 as usize || len > 10 as usize {
            return false;
        }


        return key == Self::KEYS[key.len() - 3];
    }

    pub const ITEM_COUNT: usize = 7;
    pub const MIN_KEY_LENGTH: usize = 3;
    pub const MAX_KEY_LENGTH: usize = 10;
    pub const HAS_NUMBER: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_UPPERCASE: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_LOWERCASE: bool = true;
    pub const HAS_SYMBOL: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_WHITESPACE: bool = false;
}
